design: verb-particle placement object-givenness graded forced-choice; within-frame split-preference FIREWALL shift; ratified decisions/resolved/particle-placement-anchor-and-indicator (s225); MAGNITUDE (mag) arm -- Arm 2 discourse-givenness firewall ONLY (byte-identical scored strings, three-condition GIVEN/NEW-MENTIONED/NEW, decisive GIVEN-NEW-MENTIONED, LOAD-BEARING). Arms 1 (definiteness) & 3 (length) DROPPED -- the magnitude the claim owes is the firewall shift2 (genitive-MAG typical-only analog).

context_template.given: A {noun} had been sitting nearby since dawn, and {subj} kept glancing at it.
context_template.newment: A {noun} could be handy at times, or so {subj} always liked to think.
context_template.new: The early morning had been calm and grey, and {subj} moved about without hurry.
